headline: Chairman at Ocean Group, Digital Out of Home Advertising
summary:
Having completed nearly 15 years as CEO, Tim became Ocean Group Chairman in January 2025.
Under his leadership, Ocean has become a global pioneer in creativity and technology that enhances creative use of the D/OOH medium.

As a champion, founder and inaugural chair of Oceans Digital Creative Competition, Tim and the Ocean Group have created an innovative platform that’s produced and won multiple Cannes Lions. The business has consistently proved D/OOH effectiveness via multiple industry studies which have shaped the narrative around outdoor as a trusted media channel.

Tim specialises in media brand building and turnarounds, leading businesses through private equity, float, consolidation and exit. Building on a successful career in TV, radio and outdoor, Tim led Ocean through three phases of private equity investment, followed by 3 UK acquisitions and 4 acquisitions in the Nordics and the Netherlands, expanding Ocean into Northern Europe.

Tim oversaw the company’s full LSE listing in January 2019 via Ocean’s investment partner, Ocelot. In 2022, Ocean delisted from the LSE, becoming a partner company of Atairos, the independent strategic investment company. 

A committed outdoor evangelist, Tim was a recipient of the International Leadership Award at the 2019 World OOH Congress & was appointed to the board of the World Out of Home organisation in June 2025.

experiences.title: Chairman
experiences.description: Having led Ocean Outdoor as CEO for 15 years, Tim becomes Chairman of Ocean Group effective January 1 2025.

experiences.title: Group CEO
experiences.description:
Under Tim’s leadership, Ocean has become one of the world's most dynamic DOOH companies, managing the most prestigious locations in the UK, Netherlands, the Nordics & Germany, delivering consistent revenue growth. Unlocking the value of DOOH in the rapidly evolving all screen market is a key pillar of international growth via consolidation. Ocean currently spans 7 countries in markets which lend themselves to rapid growth using the Ocean brand and ethos. European acquisitions (Ngage Media, Interbest, Beyond Outdoor & Clear Channel Netherlands roadside masts) operate as Ocean Netherlands; Visual Art & AdCityMedia are now Ocean Nordics.

The UK portfolio includes the BFI IMAX; the Landsec Piccadilly Lights and the advertising rights to Westfield London & Westfield Stratford City. Ocean continues to deliver organic growth through new city tender wins and the rollout of premium assets.

Ocean is at the forefront of tech innovation, supported by its annual Digital Creative Competition now its 15th year & operating across all European markets. 

The creation of Ocean’s Digital Cities for Digital Citizens philosophy has significantly augmented the Group’s position as a business backed by strong landlord relationships, long term contracts and high profile blue chip partnerships with Team GB, ParalympicsGB, the All England Lawn Tennis Association, BBC, ITV & British Fashion Council. Ocean’s work has won multiple industry awards including several Cannes Lions, most recently Gold for Gorillaz Skinny Ape.

Sustainability sits at the heart of the Ocean which supports multiple environmental projects as part of Its commitment to reach net zero by 2050. Tim is committed to using Ocean assets to support 100s of charities which have benefited via donated screen space & the Digital Creative Competition. The Royal Academy of Arts, London Air Ambulance, Holocaust Memorial Day Trust, Climate Action, NHS Charities & The Ruth Strauss Foundation are all partners.

experiences.title: Chairman of the Ocean Outdoor DOOH Awards Judging Panel
experiences.description: Tim chairs the annual Ocean Outdoor Digital Out of Home (DOOH) Awards (some examples can be found below).  The competition pioneers creativity by challenging brands to experiment with the endless possibilities DOOH technology offers.

experiences.title: Joint Managing Director - UK
experiences.description:
Joint responsibility for UK operations and sole responsibility for 300+ people, culture, sales and marketing. 

▪	Developed a highly successful new strategic media brand proposition, 'Consumers on the Move’ – now part of the industry’s lexicon - reinventing the business offering with a compelling way of presenting products to demonstrate increased benefit and value.

▪	Awarded ‘General Manager of the Year 2006’ in New York by CBS Outdoor International Division; won Campaign magazine’s ‘Digital Team of the Year’ and ‘Outdoor Team of the Year’ awards in 2008’.

Chairman of CBS Outdoor’s 2012 Olympics Project Committee.

experiences.title: Broadcast Sales Director and Executive Board Member (previously Emap)
experiences.description:
Commercial revenue generation for all television and radio assets and, as a member of the executive board, jointly responsible for company’s strategy and P&L.

▪	Led a team of 80 across the UK, reinvigorating performance and motivation
▪	Created a strategy (and gained buy-in from stakeholders) to champion EMAP brands across newly diversified channels; successfully positioned the company as digital radio pioneers
▪	Initiated UK’s largest syndicated network traffic & travel service as a JV with TrafficLink; successfully grew EMAP’s revenue share
▪	Worked closely with co-directors to drive EMAP’s pioneering cross-media selling

experiences.title: Deputy Managing Director/Managing Director Wireless Group Sales
experiences.description: Tim joined the struggling broadcaster in a sales leadership role which evolved, as product perception and  performance improved dramatically, into general management.

experiences.title: Account Director
experiences.description:
Negotiation and sale of advertising across the network, ultimately managing a large agency portfolio.

▪	Built a range of profitable long-term commercial partnerships with clients 

▪	Delivered the first integrated Champions’ League sponsorship deal

education.description: Studied A level Economics , History and Politics for a year in the lower 6th form.

education.description: As part of the EMAP plc top 100 managers programme studied a number of MBA modules.

education.degree_name: MBA - Technological Changes Affecting Business Futures
education.description: As part of the EMAP plc top 100 managers programme studied a number of MBA modules.

accomplishment_organisations.title: Sponsor & Partner
accomplishment_organisations.description: Ocean are the official Digital Out Of Home content partner for Team GB , having become the first Digital Out Of Home business to integrate Olympic content across our platform for the RIO Olympic Games we are now partners for the 2018 Winter Olympics in Korea and the Tokyo games in 2020.

accomplishment_honors_awards.title: CEO
accomplishment_honors_awards.description: Ocean ranked number 324 in the Deloitte Technology Fast 500 EMEA list

volunteer_work.title: Fund Raiser
volunteer_work.description: Helping to raise funds for the industry charity

volunteer_work.title: Fund Raising and sponsor
volunteer_work.description: Ocean has supported the need for a 2nd Air Ambulance for London to save lives of those living and working in a global city. A 2nd Helicopter has now been delivered. To help fund the new 2nd Helicopter medical team Tim ran the London Marathon raising in excess of £25,000 in 2016.

volunteer_work.title: Major supporter via Ocean4Oceans initiatve
volunteer_work.description: The Marine Conservation Society is the UK’s leading Marine charity and we have chosen to support it via our OceanForOceans campaign. This came about due to an unprecedented number of entries to our 2017 Digital Creative Competition by various organisations looking to improve awareness and take action against the amount of plastics building up across the worlds Oceans.
